title: Chaikin Money Flow / volume-flow MEAN-REVERSION primary on gold (XAU/XAG) -- new orthogonal driver
source: CEO-relayed external survival-sweep analysis (65/131441 video) 2026-05-29; confirmed against code by hackathon-pm.
why: External survival sweep (65/131441 video) + our own evidence converge: volume (38.7%) and mean-reversion (38.5%) are the HIGHEST-survival categories; trend-following is LOWEST (18.2%), matching our barrier-geometry retraction (no dense-trend XAU survivor) and positive-control (trend edge only concentrates in trends). The external set flags Chaikin Money Flow on GOLD at OOS Sharpe 0.99 / -9.3% DD. Our memory says the binding bottleneck is the ORTHOGONAL FEATURE SET, not the prompt -- and a volume/money-flow primary is a genuinely untested orthogonal driver (our Loop A volume mechanisms were breakdown/exhaustion momentum, not CMF mean-reversion). This cell (gold + CMF + mean-reversion framing) was NOT cleanly tested in the exhausted search.
value_rationale: High: the single most evidence-justified NEW edge candidate after the exhaustive null -- a different orthogonal driver in the highest-survival category, on our most-data asset.
scope: Feasibility spike: build a Chaikin Money Flow (CMF) mean-reversion primary on XAUUSD (+XAGUSD) D1/H4; fade CMF extremes (oversold/overbought money flow). Train/holdout, net-of-cost, IC + hit-rate + Sharpe; DSR-aware.
If the spike shows OOS promise, materialize as a phase5 custom primary + run the FULL M3 audit (purged WF + DSR gate) for a trustworthy verdict.
Compare CMF-mean-rev vs the already-falsified bollinger/momentum to confirm it is genuinely orthogonal, not a relabel.

history.reason: CMF mean-reversion fails OOS on XAU/XAG: in-sample fade real + DSR-survives, but holdout IC flips sign, hit-rate <50%, net Sharpe negative. Orthogonal to bollinger (corr +0.11-0.23) so a FAIR test of a new driver -> 8th convergent null. External Sharpe-0.99-gold hint was an in-sample fit. results/feasibility/cmf_meanrev.json.
feat(methodology+spike): DSR hard promotion gate (B0089 done) + CMF mean-rev null (B0088 discarded)
Reopened per CEO: CMF mean-reversion was tested only on XAU/XAG -> extend to the full competition universe (FX + crypto) before final verdict.
fix(execution): B0090 contract-size lot conversion + notional leverage gate; B0088 CMF full-universe

CMF mean-reversion exhausted across the universe: full M3 audit (with B0089 DSR gate) FALSIFIED GBPUSD D1 (DSR~0.0006, overfit luck caught by the gate); SOLUSD H4 inconclusive -- FOLD_CONSTRUCTION_FAILED on 1.4y history (primary sound, data too short for WF). 9th convergent null. SOL re-testable only with >=2.5y H4 history (data prerequisite, not a green light).
feat(phase5): CMF survivors die in full M3 audit (9th null); DSR gate works; fix B0087
